name: Casual Explanatory
description: Conversational explanatory writing that uses practical examples and explains trade-offs without sounding over-polished.
rules: For technical concepts, include a practical cue such as "Basically", "Think of it as", or "For example" when it helps the explanation land.
Keep the point clear without sounding formal.
antiRules: Do not overdo quirks, pet phrases, or casual slang.
Do not turn the style into parody.
